arts.ttl: Saliba to miss Liverpool game as Arsenal will not appeal red card
arts.sum: Arsenal will not appeal William Saliba's red-card decision at Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Jack Wilshere: Reason for Arsenal exit emerges with new role starting immediately
arts.sum: Jack Wilshere will leave his job as Arsenal Under 18s manager after two years leading the side to start his first role in senior coaching, with the 32-year-old departing the Gunners this week

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Shakhtar: Predicted Lineups, Score Prediction and 13/2 Bet Builder
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to get back to winning ways when they face Shakhtar at the Emirates in the Champions League tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our pre...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot told Liverpool CAN win Premier League - as Arsenal issued damning warning
arts.sum: Arne Slot has enjoyed a dream start to life at Liverpool and former Reds midfielder Didi Hamann believes his old club can go all the way in the Premier League title race this year

arts.ttl: 'Listen': Tony Adams takes dig at Tottenham as he discusses Arsenal's Champions League chances this season
Arsenal vs Liverpool referee announced as Premier League make decision amid 'bias' controversy
arts.sum: The Premier League have announced that Anthony Taylor will referee next weekend's clash between Arsenal and Liverpool, while Chris Kavanagh will only be on fourth official and VAR duty

arts.ttl: Arsenal told Rodrygo could be 'superstar' alternative to Nico Williams transfer
arts.sum: How long he does stay there is another question, and former Arsenal star Emmanuel Petit says that the attacker should be the Gunners ' top priority in the transfer market - but there is one alternative who reminds him of an Invincible - and the player in question may be easier to get. Arsenal have been told the ideal alternative to Nico Williams if the Gunners are unable to sign the Athletic Club attacker.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta secretly hired undercover football freestyler disguised as a WAITER to 'destroy' one of his Arsenal stars in bizarre pre-match motivation drill
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has continued his trend of bizarre pre-match motivation drills after it was revealed he hired a football freestyler to pose undercover as a waiter before a game.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey and Mikel Arteta agree on Arsenal star criticism as two costly problems spotted
arts.sum: Known as the Premier League's set-piece masters, Arsenal got a taste of their own medicine when Christie scored the decisive goal following a smooth corner routine. Aaron Ramsey has suggested that Gabriel Martinelli could have done more to prevent Bournemouth's opening goal in Arsenal's disappointing 2-0 defeat at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Report: £265,000-per-week Arsenal player considering leaving due to lack of game time this season
arts.sum: Arsenal’s season has hit a snag in recent weeks due to a combination of injuries, disciplinary issues and them simply not being at their best....
